ns0:entry.ns0:title: ChrisTitusTech/winutil
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ChrisTitusTech/winutil
Language: powershell
Chris Titus Tech's Windows Utility - Install Programs, Tweaks, Fixes, and Updates

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Micke-K/IntuneManagement
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Micke-K/IntuneManagement
Language: powershell
Copy, export, import, delete, document and compare policies and profiles in Intune and Azure with PowerShell script and WPF UI. Import ADMX files and registry settings with ADMX ingestion. View and edit PowerShell script.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Romanitho/Winget-AutoUpdate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Romanitho/Winget-AutoUpdate
Language: powershell
WAU daily updates apps as system and notify connected users. (Allowlist and Blocklist support)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
Language: powershell
Community-driven baseline to accelerate Intune adoption and learning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/core
Language: powershell
.NET news, announcements, release notes, and more!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mandiant/flare-vm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mandiant/flare-vm
Language: powershell
A collection of software installations scripts for Windows systems that allows you to easily setup and maintain a reverse engineering environment on a VM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/AL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/AL
Language: powershell
Home of the Dynamics 365 Business Central AL Language extension for Visual Studio Code. Used to track issues regarding the latest version of the AL compiler and developer tools available in the Visual Studio Code Marketplace or as part of the AL Developer Preview builds for Dynamics 365 Business Central.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/Agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Agents
Language: powershell
The Microsoft 365 Agent SDK simplifies building full stack, multichannel, trusted agents for platforms including M365, Teams, Copilot Studio, and Webchat.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/hve-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/hve-core
Language: powershell
A refined collection of Hypervelocity Engineering components (instructions, prompts, agents, and skills) to start your project off right, or upgrade your existing projects to get the most out of all Copilots

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/work-iq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/work-iq
Language: powershell
MCP Server and CLI for accessing Work IQ

ns0:entry.ns0:title: psmux/psmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/psmux/psmux
Language: powershell
Tmux on Windows Powershell - tmux for PowerShell, Windows Terminal, cmd.exe. Includes psmux, pmux, and tmux commands. This is native Powershell Tmux designed for Windows in Rust 🦀
